comments.body:
:boom: Invalid `.papr.yml`: failed to parse 1st testsuite: Schema validation failed:
 - Value 'b'sh .papr.sh'' is not a list. Value path: '/tests'..
lets make sure it passes before merging

> container create failed: /tmp/

So I suspect everyone writing this code never tested on an ostree-managed system.  Today we have `/tmp` → `/sysroot/tmp`.  There's a long history behind this; see https://github.com/projectatomic/rpm-ostree/pull/778 and https://pagure.io/fedora-kickstarts/pull-request/239 

Since this code is changing namespaces it'll lose `/sysroot`.  I haven't looked in detail, but I'd pass data via a more explicit method (or alternatively perhaps manually chase `/tmp` if it's a symlink?)
@baude I'd like to help with this, but I'm not finding now the log message I found earlier?  It looks like the PR tip has a generic shell syntax error now.
